description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a white exterior, featuring a flat and gabled roof combination. The property includes a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a small outdoor dining area. There is a driveway leading to a single-car garage, bordered by manicured hedges and trees, including flowering and leafy varieties. The backyard is equipped with a children's playhouse and a shaded seating area. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The landscaping is well-maintained, with a mix of paved, grassy, and wooden surfaces throughout the lot.
description: A modern white bungalow with a gabled and flat roof, wooden deck, pool, garage, and landscaped yard featuring trees and a playhouse.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, pool, deck, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the extended wooden deck with a playhouse visible to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, deck, outdoor seating, and the playhouse, with the house's back facade and large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, outdoor dining area, driveway, and the front yard with trees and hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
